name: Market Data
description: Scrapes market data (prices, indicators, commodities), manages profiles/snapshots/events, reads from storage on request.
conversation_starters: Scrape latest market data for all watched entities and store snapshots
Refresh price + indicator data for US tech stocks (AAPL, MSFT, GOOG, NVDA, TSLA)
What's the latest commodity price data? (oil, gold, copper)

name: OSINT Data
description: Scrapes OSINT data (disasters, conflicts, weather, health, elections, transport, agriculture), manages profiles/snapshots/events.
conversation_starters: Scrape latest OSINT data: disasters, conflicts, weather, health, elections worldwide
What are the latest earthquake and volcanic events?
Check conflict data for MENA region and store any new events

name: Signals Data
description: Scrapes signal data (RSS, Reddit, HN, crypto sentiment), manages profiles/snapshots/events.
conversation_starters: Scrape latest signals: RSS feeds, Reddit, HN, crypto sentiment
What are the top trending tickers on Reddit and HN right now?
Check crypto sentiment for BTC, ETH, SOL and store snapshots

name: Market Analyst
description: Analyzes market data, identifies trends and patterns, writes analysis notes. Hands off to Market Data for reads.
_tool_filter_note: Only note tools: store_save_note, store_get_notes, store_update_note, store_delete_note
conversation_starters: Analyze latest market data trends. Read your previous notes first, then get fresh data.
What sector rotation patterns do you see in the current market data?
Review recent signal changes and write analysis notes

name: OSINT Analyst
description: Analyzes OSINT data, threat assessment, country risk, supply chain exposure. Hands off to OSINT Data for reads.
conversation_starters: Analyze latest OSINT data: threat assessment, country risk, supply chain exposure
What are the highest-risk geopolitical developments right now?
Review recent disaster and conflict events and write risk analysis notes

name: Signals Analyst
description: Analyzes signal data, sentiment aggregation, narrative detection, filing significance. Hands off to Signals Data for reads.
conversation_starters: Analyze latest signals: sentiment, narratives, filing significance
What narratives are emerging across RSS, Reddit, and HN?
Review recent signal data and write sentiment analysis notes

name: Market Synthesizer
description: Cross-domain analysis: correlates disasters, markets, signals. Reads all analyst notes and raw data via data agents.
conversation_starters: Read all analyst notes and produce a cross-domain briefing with composite risk scores
What cross-domain patterns do you see? (market + geopolitical + signals)
Correlate recent disaster/conflict events with market impact. Write a prediction.

name: Cron Planner
description: Autonomous research organizer. Schedules scraping, triggers analysis, ensures data freshness and coverage.
conversation_starters: Execute your periodic routine: 1) Read plans (store_get_notes kind=plan). 2) For watched entities, refresh data via data agents. 3) Run analysis if data is stale. 4) Update plans with results. 5) Log summary.
Show me your current plans and watchlists (store_get_notes kind=plan)
Read your recent execution logs (store_get_notes kind=journal tag=cron) and summarize coverage gaps

name: Bootstrap
description: Bulk bootstrapper. Delegates to L1 data agents for profiles, events, snapshots, and creates initial plans for cron-planner.
conversation_starters: Bootstrap countries profiles: fetch macro data via L1 agents and store profiles.
Bootstrap stocks profiles: fetch price + fundamentals via market-data agent.
Seed current events: delegate to L1 agents to scrape recent news, disasters, market moves and store as events.
Create initial plans and watchlists for cron-planner based on bootstrap results.
Resume bootstrap: read journal logs (store_get_notes kind=journal tag=bootstrap) and report coverage gaps.

name: News: The Augur
description: Produces EN general prediction articles for The Augur. Researches geopolitical, environmental, humanitarian signals.
conversation_starters: Check augur_due_now() and produce any due articles.
What articles are due for The Augur? Show the schedule.
Write a Tomorrow article about the most significant current event

name: News: Der Augur
description: Produces DE general prediction articles for Der Augur. German language, geopolitical/environmental focus.
conversation_starters: Prüfe augur_due_now() und produziere fällige Artikel.
Welche Artikel sind für Der Augur fällig? Zeige den Zeitplan.
Schreibe einen Morgen-Artikel über das bedeutendste aktuelle Ereignis

name: News: Financial Augur
description: Produces EN market prediction articles for Financial Augur. Macro, sector rotation, commodities focus.
conversation_starters: Check augur_due_now() and produce any due articles.
What articles are due for Financial Augur? Show the schedule.
Write a Tomorrow article about the most significant market development

name: News: Finanz Augur
description: Produces DE market prediction articles for Finanz Augur. German language, macro/sector focus.
conversation_starters: Prüfe augur_due_now() und produziere fällige Artikel.
Welche Artikel sind für Finanz Augur fällig? Zeige den Zeitplan.
Schreibe einen Morgen-Artikel über die bedeutendste Marktentwicklung

name: Trader
description: Stateless broker agent: executes trades, checks portfolio, positions, P&L, fills. Risk-gated.
conversation_starters: Check risk status and show current portfolio positions
What is the current daily action budget remaining?

name: Trading Cron
description: Autonomous trading executor. Reads trade plans, checks risk, executes entries/exits via trader, monitors positions.
conversation_starters: Execute trading routine: 1) Read trade plans. 2) Check risk status. 3) Get latest prices. 4) Evaluate signals. 5) Execute trades if conditions met. 6) Log results.
Show current trade plans (store_get_notes kind=plan tags=trading)
Read recent trading logs (store_get_notes kind=journal tag=cron-trading) and summarize P&L

name: Charter
description: Stateless chart agent: generates Plotly charts and visualizations from store data.
conversation_starters: Chart the last 30 days of AAPL price + RSI indicators
Show me a comparison chart of BTC vs ETH price trends
Chart recent events by severity (bar chart)

name: Trading Assistant
description: Your AI trading assistant. Manages plans, delegates to specialist agents, executes trades, watches portfolio.
conversation_starters: What's happening in markets and the world right now? Give me a full briefing.
Run a full data refresh: scrape all domains, analyze, and synthesize a report.
Show me recent analyst notes and any active predictions.
What are the highest-risk entities in my watchlist right now?
